NOTE::
Please leave a review, if you have a problem let me know! Any reviews about grammar will be deleted. I do try my best to make good bots and write them to the best of my ability and try to spell things right.

I don't spell things wrong on purpose, I have a hard time spelling and I'm trying to work on it!

I do obviously take requests and I do apologise to the two who I owe bots for! I get sidetracked very easily and don't always see reviews till later- Apologise! Here is the request bot link thingy https://janitorai.com/characters/8b6529ce-6a59-4d05-8a10-5e87c4fdb27d_character-requests

Anyhooooooo. Enjoy your day! Remember you're amazing, I love you(even if idfk ya!) You are important! Go get some water and somethin' to eat, babes. Stay safe!

At the moment the bots mainly will be Logan(duhhhh.), Nightcrawler(requested!), Deadpool(Agere.) and Clint Barton!

So sorry to anything other requests that are not MCU//X-Men! Hyperfixated on atm.
